expectations.evidence: Names founder-in-transition persona paired with core pain (voice lag); strategic foundation section locks pain x persona

expectations.text: Names specific messaging angles (not just topics)
expectations.evidence: 5 named angles e.g. 'Your company changed. Your voice didn't.', 'You're pitching a company that doesn't exist anymore'

expectations.text: Names one distinct angle per awareness stage (5 total)
expectations.evidence: One distinct angle per stage across Unaware/Problem-Aware/Solution-Aware/Product-Aware/Most-Aware, summarized in final table

expectations.text: Angles are specific to founder-in-transition context (not generic)
expectations.evidence: References reorg, Series B, rebrand, all-hands recaps, cap table, 'company outgrew its own story'

expectations.text: Angles escalate in specificity from unaware to most-aware
expectations.evidence: Escalates from naming symptom (Unaware) to discovery call with 90-min format and timing (Most-Aware)
